uint8.message: Incompatibility found during quantization: Impossible to quantize inputs: unsigned quantization (input_dtype = uint8) is only possible if first layer (dw_btc) was one of (<class 'tf_keras.src.layers.convolutional.conv2d.Conv2D'>, <class 'quantizeml.layers.buffer_temp_conv.BufferTempConv'>, <class 'tf_keras.src.layers.core.dense.Dense'>, <class 'quantizeml.layers.stateful_recurrent.StatefulProjection'>).

int8.message: Incompatibility found during quantization: batch_size not specified. With spatiotemporal TENN models batch_size must be given for the calibration, otherwise the result is unpredictable. Refer to 'calibrate' function docstring for more details.

conversion.message:
Invalid block found during conversion:
 DepthwiseBufferTempConv (dw_btc)
QuantizedReLU (relu6)
Compatible patterns that contain the faulty layers are:
 - QuantizedDense > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedFlatten > QuantizedDense > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedReshape > QuantizedDense > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedReshape > QuantizedFlatten > QuantizedDense > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedConv2D > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedConv2D > QuantizedMaxPool2D > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedConv2D > QuantizedReLU > QuantizedGlobalAveragePooling2D
 - QuantizedConv2DTranspose > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedDepthwiseConv2D > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedDepthwiseConv2D > QuantizedMaxPool2D > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedDepthwiseConv2DTranspose > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedBufferTempConv > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedDepthwiseBufferTempConv > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedStatefulProjection > QuantizedStatefulRecurrent > QuantizedExtractToken > QuantizedStatefulProjection > QuantizedReLU
